sources.manufacturerUrl: viltrox.com/collections/cine-lenses (tier-1; individual product page URL not accessible during research)
sources.weightG: CineD first-look citing manufacturer: ~16 kg = 16,000g. newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.frontDiameterMm: Not published in any accessible source
sources.closeFocusM: CineD first-look: 1.8m / 6 ft. newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.introductionYear: Announced / launched 2024. newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.imageCircleMm: CineD first-look: 60mm image circle (covers ALEXA 65, GFX100, URSA Cine 17K). newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.opticalElements: CineD first-look: 11 elements in 9 groups (incl. 4 ED + 3 high-refractive-index). newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.filterType: CineD first-look: rear filter slot confirmed; no front filter thread. newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.filterThreadMm: Rear slot system; no thread size specified
sources.isParfocal: Parfocal not explicitly confirmed in accessible sources for 42-420mm T5.6
sources.gearPitch: Viltrox: 0.8 MOD (focus, iris, zoom). newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)

lenses.description: The larger-format sibling in Viltrox's LUNA statement cine-zoom line, covering medium and large formats with the same constant-aperture, parfocal design and even greater reach. Like its counterpart it holds focus consistently through an extreme zoom range in a massive unified white barrel, built for long-range wildlife and sports work with magnetic filters and matte-box compatibility.
